title: Twister

sections.heading: WHAT YOU'LL NEED TO PLAY
sections.middleText2: printed images of body parts and coloured dots  used in Twister

sections.heading: HOW TO PLAY
sections.body:
1. Attach body-part images to the spinner. The switch user spins to choose the body part the player must use.
2. Attach the Twister colour-dot images to the spinner and repeat to choose the colour the player places that body part on, e.g. right hand on a green spot.
NB: If you do not have a spinner, use an online one. Many free, customisable options work with a switch and switch interface.

tooltipText: Use a switch accessible spinner to join in on a game of Twister
